title: Create ToolExecutor: tool dispatch and result handling
completion_summary: Created ToolExecutor with execute() and listAvailable(), wired to toolRegistry singleton
acceptance_criteria: execute(toolName: string, params: Record<string, unknown>): Promise<ToolResult>
Looks up tool in registry, calls tool.execute(params), returns ToolResult
If tool not found: returns { success: false, output: '', error: 'Tool not found: ...' }
If tool throws: catches error, returns { success: false, output: '', error: message }
Successful execution: returns { success: true, output: string from tool }
